data.title: Akemona to Power Upcoming Tokenized Offering for Industrialized Innovation Impact Portfolio I
data.description: Akemona, Inc., a company based in Fullerton, California, has announced a new initiative aimed at aiding 100 businesses in tokenizing and monetizing innovation-driven intellectual property. This effort will involve the commercialization of acquired IP. The initiative was launched on April 17, 2026. Akemona is known for its services in tokenization and the issuance of digital assets.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Announces Filing of 2025 Annual Report and Form 20-F
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on April 17, 2026, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) released its annual report for the year ending on December 31, 2025. The report was submitted to the Mexican National Banking and Securities Commission, the Mexican Stock Exchange, and the Institutional Stock Market Exchange, while Form 20-F was filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: 73% odds of Hormuz Strait normalizing by May as BTC reaches $78K; Iran reopens passage during ceasefire. Analysts caution on fragile truce.
data.description: Following the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz during a ceasefire in Iran, prediction market odds have seen a significant spike. Bitcoin also experienced a rally, reaching $78,000. However, analysts are cautioning that despite these positive movements, the truce in the region is still deemed fragile. This development reflects the heightened market response to the events in Iran, with various indicators showing significant shifts in numbers.

data.title: Russian bill suggests up to 7 years jail time and $13,100 fines for unlicensed crypto services as government increases digital asset regulation.
data.description: A recent legislation in Russia is focusing on unregistered crypto operators, threatening them with a maximum of 7 years in prison and fines reaching $13,100. This move is part of Moscow's efforts to enhance supervision over digital assets.
Iran's Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: As the blockade continues, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open.

data.title: Ibero Announces Closing of Non-Brokered Private Placement of Units
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC – On April 17, 2026, Ibero Mining Corp. (TSX.V: IMC) (OTCQB: AUCCF) announced the successful closure of a non-brokered private placement. Following earlier communications from February 12, 2026, and March 30, 2026, as well as a partial revocation order from the British Columbia Securities Commission (BCSC) on February 11, 2026, and subsequent variation orders on February 11, 2026, March 19, 2026, and March 27, 2026, a total of 16,666,667 units were issued at $0.03 per unit. This resulted in total proceeds of $500,000. Each unit comprises a common share and a common share purchase warrant, allowing the holder to acquire an additional common share at $0.08 within thirty-six months from the closing date.

data.title: Five Star Bancorp Declares First Quarter Cash Dividend
data.description: Today, in Rancho Cordova, California, Five Star Bancorp (Nasdaq: FSBC) declared a cash dividend of $0.25 per share on its voting common stock. The dividend will be paid on May 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026. The company operates through its wholly owned banking subsidiary, Five Star Bank.

data.title: AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. and AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. Announcement Regarding Planned Merger of Equitable and Corebridge
data.description: Equitable Holdings, Inc. ("EQH"), a majority partner in AllianceBernstein L.P., which serves as the investment advisor for AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AWF), made significant moves on March 26, 2026.EQH holds the majority of partnership interests in AllianceBernstein L.P., which advises AWF on investment strategies.

data.title: Terra Innovatum Provides Update on Annual Report Filing Process
data.description: On April 17, 2026, Terra Innovatum Global N.V. (NASDAQ: NKLR) revealed that it received a Nasdaq Listing Delinquency Letter. The company, known for the SOLO™ Micro-Modular Reactor, also shared details about the delayed submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: ESCMID Global: Maternal RSV vaccination cuts infant hospitalisation risk by over 80%, major UKHSA study finds
data.description: In Munich on April 18, 2026, a significant study was unveiled at ESCMID Global 2026, demonstrating the impact of maternal vaccination against respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) on young infants. This groundbreaking real-world study revealed that receiving the vaccine at least two weeks before birth can lead to an impressive reduction of over 80% in the risk of hospitalization among infants. These findings highlight the crucial importance of maternal RSV vaccination in safeguarding the health of young children.

data.title: Gregory A. Fishman and Mathew Rosengart Named to 2026 Los Angeles Business Journal Top 100 Lawyers List
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 17, 2026, Gregory A. Fishman and Mathew S. Rosengart, both shareholders at Greenberg Traurig LLP's Los Angeles office, were honored by being included in the prestigious "Top 100 Lawyers" list for 2026 by the Los Angeles Business Journal. This recognition underscores their outstanding legal prowess and contribution to the legal field amidst fierce competition in the city. This acknowledgment further solidifies their reputation as top legal professionals in a bustling legal landscape.

data.title: PacSci Names Kevin Malgesini as President & Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Seattle on April 17, 2026, Pacific Science Center (PacSci) made an announcement regarding the appointment of Kevin Malgesini as their new President & CEO. Previously serving as the Managing Director at Seattle Children's Theatre (SCT) starting in 2018, Kevin brings a wealth of experience to his new role. The transition marks a significant change for PacSci as they welcome Kevin to lead the organization.

data.title: Knowlej and Chime Launch Financial Futures Campaign to Help Students Build Financial Confidence and Strengthen Engagement in School
data.description: Knowlej introduced its latest initiative, Knowlej Financial Futures, on April 17, 2026. This program, developed in partnership with the renowned financial technology firm Chime, aims to enhance financial literacy among middle and high school students. The challenge series offered by Knowlej Financial Futures is specially designed to equip students with practical knowledge in this crucial area.

data.title: Apes Hill Barbados Welcomes Staysure Legends Tour to Luxury Resort Residential Community, April 24-26; Hosted by Masters and Ryder Cup Champion Ian Woosnam
data.description: In St. James, Barbados, starting on April 24, 2026, Apes Hill Barbados, known as the luxury resort-residential golf and lifestyle community in the Caribbean, is excited to host the Staysure Legends Tour until April 26. This event will feature numerous renowned golfers competing in a prestigious tournament.

data.title: Brayton Purcell LLP Announces Expanded California Effort Supporting Cal/OSHA Petition to Prohibit High-Silica Artificial Stone; Highlights Capital & Main Investigation on Federal Liability Shield
data.description: On April 17, 2026, a law firm based in Novato, California, reaffirmed its commitment to backing a petition submitted to the Cal/OSHA Standards Board by the Western Occupational and Environmental Medicine Association (WOEMA). The petition aims to advocate for improved occupational safety standards. The law firm, Brayton Purcell LLP, will be expanding its efforts in California to support this initiative further.

data.title: IsoEnergy Announces New At-The-Market Equity Program
data.description: On April 17, 2026, IsoEnergy Ltd (NYSE American: ISOU) (TSX: ISO) revealed its equity distribution deal with Virtu Canada Corp. The agreement, named the Distribution Agreement, marks a significant step for the Company. This move holds promise for future growth and investment opportunities, reflecting the Company's strategic vision.

data.title: Boston Health AI Secures Its US Footprint Through Implementation with Avicenna Clinics
data.description: In Houston, the Avicenna Clinics recently incorporated the Clinical Intelligence Companion, Hami, into their clinical operations. This deployment represents a significant step in integrating AI into healthcare practices.

data.title: Bill in Russia to criminalize unregistered crypto services. Required to register with Bank of Russia or face fines/prison.
data.description: Before providing specific cryptocurrency services, individuals and organizations must now register with the Bank of Russia to ensure compliance. Failure to do so could result in penalties or imprisonment.
